backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the Product type and CRUD operations (add, update, delete) for a product catalog, using a Map for storage and a migration hook to drop cart/order state from older versions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (which included carts and orders) into the new actor state containing only products and nextProductId.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the /admin route with product management UI, listing the relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, briefly describing the purpose of each component, page, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Glow Shop — Luxury Cosmetics' with Google Fonts preconnect links and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with all page routes (home, shop, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin) wrapped in a shared Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart line-item component displaying product image, name, price, a quantity selector with live backend sync, line total, and a remove button with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/DeleteProductDia: Alert dialog component that confirms and executes product deletion via the useDeleteProduct mutation, showing a spinner during the request and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Section component that fetches and displays up to 8 featured products in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a 'View All' link to /shop.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, brand promises, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Displays a full-width hero section with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and a 'Shop Now' call-to-action button linking to /shop.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a sticky Navigation header, a main content Outlet, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links (Home, Shop, Admin), and a cart icon showing the current item count from the cart query.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product as a card with image, category, name, price, and an add-to-cart button; handles out-of-stock state and shows toast notifications on cart actions.
frontend/src/components/ProductFilters.t: Sidebar filter panel for the shop page providing category pill buttons and a price-range slider, with a clear-all option when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/ProductFormDialo: Modal dialog for adding or editing a product, containing a validated form with fields for name, category, description, price, image URL, stock, and featured flag; uses add/update product mutations.
frontend/src/components/ProductTable.tsx: Renders a table of products with image, category, price, stock, and featured status columns, and provides edit/delete actions via dialog modals. Shows an empty state when no products exist.
frontend/src/components/PromoBanner.tsx: Displays a horizontally scrolling marquee banner with promotional messages over a rose-tinted background image.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: A controlled quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons and a numeric input field, constrained by configurable min/max values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including fetching products, admin CRUD mutations for products, and cart/order interactions via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports brand fonts, defines CSS custom properties for the light/dark theme color system, and adds utility classes and a marquee animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays a product table with stats (total, featured, out-of-stock counts) and provides buttons to refresh the list or open a dialog to add a new product.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that fetches cart items and products, displays them with a subtotal summary, and handles empty/loading states with skeleton placeholders.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that shows order items, calculates subtotal/shipping/total, and handles order placement by calling the placeOrder and clearCart mutations before navigating to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes the hero banner, promo banner, featured products, a features section highlighting brand values, and a CTA section linking to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page that reads the last order ID from sessionStorage, displays a success message with the order reference, and provides links to continue shopping or return home.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID, displays its image, price, stock status, and a quantity selector, and allows the user to add it to the cart.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop page component that fetches all products and renders them in a responsive grid with sidebar filters for category and price range, including mobile filter toggle support.
frontend/src/types.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces (Product, CartItem, ShoppingCart, Order) that mirror the backend data structures for the cosmetics store.
frontend/src/utils/imageHelpers.ts: Utility functions that return paths to static generated image assets (hero banner, product placeholder, promo banner) with a fallback to placeholder for missing product images.
frontend/src/utils/session.ts: Manages a persistent browser session ID stored in localStorage, generating a UUID v4 on first visit and reusing it on subsequent visits.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Jost), a cosmetics-brand color palette using OKLCH variables, custom shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, feature list with IDs and requirement mappings, and architectural notes for the cosmetics e-commerce site.
